description: inspect a locale's managed persona schema (PII + synthetic-persona fields), read-only
rules: read-only — reads a locale parquet schema, mutates nothing
requires the data-designer package + downloaded managed assets for the locale
limitation: Requires the data-designer Python package and the locale's managed-asset parquet downloaded to ~/.data-designer/managed-assets/datasets/. data-designer requires Python >= 3.10; the data-designer CLI/library is not installed in this environment by default.
